channel.title: Visualization on Amitav Krishna
channel.description: Recent content in Visualization on Amitav Krishna

item.title: A Simpler Way to Visualize Higher Dimensions
item.description:
I’ve been thinking a lot lately about how one teaches the concepts of functions that operate at higher-dimensions, like a function that takes two inputs and returns two outputs. This is hard, because most of our…

Note: This post is a work in progress.
